testcase.name: autumnOutfits_ShouldIncludeMidLayer
testcase.system-out:
15:04:43.823 [main] INFO com.w_s_backend.w_s.Services.ClothCardService -- === Фильтрация категории TOP_BASE === 15:04:43.827 [main] INFO com.w_s_backend.w_s.Services.ClothCardService -- Всего вещей: 1 теплота=4 | matchStyle=true | matchWeather=true 15:04:43.830 [main] INFO com.w_s_backend.w_s.Services.ClothCardService -- После фильтрации: 1 15:04:43.831 [main] INFO testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\serge\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.17.8\byte-buddy-agent-1.17.8.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

testcase.name: winterOutfits_ShouldHaveMoreThanTwoItems

failure.message: ❌ Образ 'Зимний тест #1' не содержит свитера или куртки! ==> expected: <true> but was: <false>

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: ❌ Образ 'Зимний тест #1' не содержит свитера или куртки! ==> expected: <true> but was: <false> at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.build(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:151) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.buildAndThrow(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:132) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertTrue.failNotTrue(AssertTrue.java:63) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertTrue.assertTrue(AssertTrue.java:36) at org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertTrue(Assertions.java:214) at com.w_s_backend.w_s.ClothCardServiceTest.winterOutfits_ShouldHaveMoreThanTwoItems(ClothCardServiceTest.java:144) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596)

testcase.name: winterOutfits_ShouldNotBeOnlyTopAndBottom

failure.message: ❌ Образ 'Повседневный образ #4' содержит только верх и низ! При -10°C нужны слои. ==> expected: <false> but was: <true>

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: ❌ Образ 'Повседневный образ #4' содержит только верх и низ! При -10°C нужны слои. ==> expected: <false> but was: <true> at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.build(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:151) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.buildAndThrow(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:132) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertFalse.failNotFalse(AssertFalse.java:63) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertFalse.assertFalse(AssertFalse.java:36) at org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertFalse(Assertions.java:239) at com.w_s_backend.w_s.ClothCardServiceTest.winterOutfits_ShouldNotBeOnlyTopAndBottom(ClothCardServiceTest.java:207) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596)

образ 'Повседневный образ #2': 5 предметов 15:04:43.878 [main] INFO com.w_s_backend.w_s.Services.ClothCardService -- Сохранен образ 'Повседневный образ #3': 3 предметов 15:04:43.878 [main] INFO com.w_s_backend.w_s.Services.ClothCardService -- Сохранен образ 'Повседневный образ #4': 2 предметов 15:04:43.878 [main] INFO com.w_s_backend.w_s.Services.ClothCardService -- Сохранен образ 'Повседневный образ #5': 3 предметов
✅ Проверка, что нет образов только из верха и низа (-10°C): 🔹 Повседневный образ #1 — 3 вещей, категории: [BOTTOM, TOP_BASE, TOP_MID] 🔹 Повседневный образ #2 — 5 вещей, категории: [TOP_OUTER, BOTTOM, SHOES, TOP_BASE, TOP_MID] 🔹 Повседневный образ #3 — 3 вещей, категории: [TOP_OUTER, BOTTOM, TOP_BASE] 🔹 Повседневный образ #4 — 2 вещей, категории: [BOTTOM, TOP_BASE]
